message:
refactor(cli): Remove deprecated skill management commands

Removes the install, installed, uninstall, update, and skills commands
from the CLI as skill management is now handled by the 'ms' CLI tool
and the premium web interface.

Also includes minor fixes:
- render.ts: Use instanceof Error check before accessing .message
  property for safer error handling
- registry.ts: Add @deprecated JSDoc to searchPromptsByText pointing
  users to the new BM25+semantic search in @jeffreysprompts/core/search

Removed files:
- packages/cli/src/commands/install.ts
- packages/cli/src/commands/installed.ts
- packages/cli/src/commands/skills.ts
- packages/cli/src/commands/uninstall.ts
- packages/cli/src/commands/update.ts

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
